rows: Scoped client request workflow handlers, broker recruitment panel rendering, wizard service API calls, and project request broker decision service/controller paths
Cover client viewing of broker applications, broker hiring confirmation and refresh flow, invalid-state broker acceptance rejection, and authorized broker-slot release behavior.
The client is viewing a request detail page in broker-recruitment phase
The request includes broker proposal items in the response payload
The actor owns the request or is an internal staff/admin user
The request is still in PUBLIC_DRAFT, PRIVATE_DRAFT, or PENDING_SPECS before accepting a broker
The request has no broker assigned before releasing a slot
Render the phase-1 Incoming Applications view
Run acceptBroker through the backend service/controller flow
Trigger the UI hire-broker confirmation and success refresh path
There are one or more pending broker proposals
There are zero pending broker proposals
The request is already COMPLETED or otherwise outside an allowed accept state
Pending applications are displayed with broker identity, date, cover letter, and hire action
The screen falls back to the no-applications empty state
Release Slot appears only when the permission flag allows it
Selected broker becomes assigned, chosen proposal is ACCEPTED, and competing pending proposals are REJECTED
The confirmation flow gates the API call and the page refreshes into the broker-hired state after success
The targeted proposal is REJECTED and refreshed slot data is returned after authorized slot release
Invalid-state acceptance is rejected without mutating the request or proposal repositories
